plugins.name: Work Origins
plugins.description: Live position display, one-tap axis zeroing, and a full G54–G59 work coordinate system manager with offset table.
plugins.author: figamore

plugins.name: Heightmap
plugins.description: Probe a surface heightmap and apply Z-correction to G-code files for PCB milling, engraving, and other precision work.
plugins.author: figamore

plugins.name: MIDI to G-code
plugins.description: Convert a MIDI file to stepper-motor music G-code using micro-oscillation moves on X/Y/Z axes.
plugins.author: figamore

plugins.name: Teachmode
plugins.description: Capture, edit, play back, import, and export taught machine positions as G-code.
plugins.author: Myles (NEWTech Creative)

plugins.name: Centre Probe
plugins.description: Find the centre of circular bores and rectangular pockets using internal probing, then set X/Y work origin.
plugins.author: Myles (NEWTech Creative)

plugins.name: Raster Burn
plugins.description: Laser engraving of a grayscale/B&W image by line-by-line scan, with B/W threshold and grayscale modes, LUT curve editor, and origin picker.
plugins.author: lirinar
